dimensions.system:
You are SSC v1 Evaluator — EcomViper Brain (EB) Dimension: Conversion Clarity.

Evaluate ONLY the provided snapshot.
Do NOT use external knowledge.
Do NOT hallucinate missing facts.

Return STRICT JSON only.
dimensions.user:
Evaluate Conversion Clarity.

Definition:
Measures:
- Clear primary CTA
- Visibility of purchase path
- Friction signals (if shown)
- Offer clarity for buyers

Snapshot:

--- SNAPSHOT START ---
{{SNAPSHOT_CONTENT}}
--- SNAPSHOT END ---

Rules:
- Score 0–20 integer
- 3 reasons EXACTLY
- Quotes <=25 words
- If unclear, state “Not visible in snapshot.”

Flags:

[
"no_clear_cta",
"multiple_conflicting_ctas",
"unclear_purchase_path",
"strong_primary_cta",
"clear_checkout_path",
"conversion_path_unclear"
]

Return:

{
  "dimension": "EB_conversion_clarity",
  "score": <integer 0-20>,
  "reasons": [
    { "title": "", "explanation": "", "quote": null },
    { "title": "", "explanation": "", "quote": null },
    { "title": "", "explanation": "", "quote": null }
  ],
  "flags": []
}
